var S0, S2, S4, S5, S10, S12, S16, S19, S24
ext S1, S3, S6, S11, S13, S15, S17, S18, S22, S23;
J0: S16 -> S23 + S24; E0*(k0*S16 - k0r*S23*S24);
J1: S10 + S3 -> S1; E1*(k1*S10*S3 - k1r*S1);
J2: S3 -> S12 + S0; E2*(k2*S3 - k2r*S12*S0);
J3: S16 + S4 -> S19; E3*(k3*S16*S4 - k3r*S19);
J4: S11 + S5 -> S2; E4*(k4*S11*S5 - k4r*S2);
J5: S24 + S3 -> S6; E5*(k5*S24*S3 - k5r*S6);
J6: S2 -> S19; E6*(k6*S2 - k6r*S19);
J7: S12 -> S16 + S4; E7*(k7*S12 - k7r*S16*S4);
J8: S19 -> S16; E8*(k8*S19 - k8r*S16);
J9: S0 -> S10 + S17; E9*(k9*S0 - k9r*S10*S17);
J10: S15 -> S5 + S22; E10*(k10*S15 - k10r*S5*S22);
J11: S13 -> S5 + S18; E11*(k11*S13 - k11r*S5*S18);

k0 = 0.5216319084138278
k0r = 0.11510180947576776
k1 = 0.572419748400074
k1r = 0.12014295727107516
k2 = 0.6714593081066058
